## Requirements
What this PR needed to satisfy
- [ ]
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The change works on desktop
- [ ] The change works on mobile
- [ ] No obvious horizontal overflow
- [ ] Existing tabs/pages still work
- [ ] No unnecessary UI clutter was added
- [ ] Accessibility basics were checked
- [ ] Reduced-motion behavior was considered if animation changed
- [ ] Relevant checks pass
